title: Binomial Distribution
description: Master the most important discrete distribution.

lessons.title: Bernoulli Process
lessons.content:
## Bernoulli Process

Fixed n trials, independent, two outcomes, constant p.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Binomial Random Variable
lessons.content:
## Binomial Random Variable

X = number of successes in n Bernoulli trials.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Binomial PMF
lessons.content:
## Binomial PMF

P(X=x) = C(n,x) p^x (1-p)^(n-x).

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Mean and Variance
lessons.content:
## Mean and Variance

μ = np, σ² = np(1-p).

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.
